name: Zucchini Patties
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter and oil together in a 12-inch skillet over moderate heat. Meanwhile, quickly mix the zucchini with the flour, eggs, salt, and pepper to form a batter.
2. Drop tablespoonfuls of batter into the hot butter and oil to form patties about 6 inches in diameter. Flatten each patty slightly with the back of a spoon. Reserve the remaining batter.
3. Cook the patties for about 4 minutes on each side, or until they are golden brown and crusty. Remove them to a platter covered with paper towels and set in a keep-warm (250°F) oven. Use the remaining batter to cook 6 more patties in the same manner, adding up to 1 more tablespoon of oil to the skillet if needed.
